questions.text: The sum of angles in a triangle is:
questions.explanation: The angle sum property of a triangle states that the sum of all three interior angles is 180°.

questions.text: In a right triangle, the side opposite to the right angle is called hypotenuse.
questions.explanation: The hypotenuse is the longest side of a right triangle, opposite to the right angle.

questions.text: What is an altitude of a triangle?
questions.correctAnswer: A perpendicular line segment from a vertex to the opposite side.
questions.explanation: An altitude is the perpendicular dropped from a vertex to the line containing the opposite side.

questions.text: A triangle with all sides equal is called an ________ triangle.
questions.explanation: An equilateral triangle has all three sides equal and all three angles equal to 60°.
